scenes.title: SPRINGMARC
scenes.narration: At Springmarc, your future home starts as a floor plan you can actually see.
scenes.subtitle: SEE IT BEFORE IT IS BUILT.

scenes.title: CHOOSE ANY STYLE
scenes.narration: Choose any Pinterest style, and we turn the plan into a real design preview.
scenes.subtitle: ANY STYLE. SAME FLOOR PLAN.

scenes.title: Unit A1
scenes.narration: Choose Unit A1: 1 bed / 1 bath, 689 square feet, starting at only 2,040.
scenes.subtitle: Unit A1: STARTING AT $2,040

scenes.title: Unit B2
scenes.narration: Or Unit B2: 2 bed / 2 bath, 9which is 988 square feet, starting at only 2,620.
scenes.subtitle: Unit B2: STARTING AT ONLY $2,620

scenes.title: Unit C3
scenes.narration: Unit C3: 3 bed / 2 bath, 1,250 sq ft, starting at $3,180.
scenes.subtitle: Unit C3: STARTING AT $3,180

scenes.title: NEST
scenes.narration: Here is the Japandi board applied: low sofa, wood table, desk corner, and patio light.
scenes.subtitle: YOUR PINTEREST STYLE, APPLIED.
must_include: crib not present in this room (crib only in bedroom)
rattan pendant or warm floor lamp

scenes.title: DREAM
scenes.narration: The bedroom keeps the crib, platform bed, and soft textiles calm from day one.
scenes.subtitle: BEDROOM PREVIEW BEFORE MOVE-IN.

scenes.title: TASTE
scenes.narration: Kitchen detail: ceramics, cutting board, matte hardware, and a clean counter line.
scenes.subtitle: STYLE-MATCHED KITCHEN DETAIL.
must_include: soft natural task light from dining area

scenes.title: DINE
scenes.narration: Dining shows the round oak table, rattan pendant, and the window light buyers remember.
scenes.subtitle: OAK, RATTAN, WINDOW LIGHT.

scenes.title: RELAX
scenes.narration: The patio completes the story with low seating, lantern glow, and indoor outdoor calm.
scenes.subtitle: THE INDOOR OUTDOOR MOMENT.

scenes.title: REVIVE
scenes.narration: Even the bathroom gets the same direction: matte vanity, folded towels, spa texture.
scenes.subtitle: EVERY ROOM GETS THE STYLE.
must_include: matte finishes and minimal ceramic accessories

scenes.title: HAUS FOR SPRINGMARC
scenes.narration: That is the offer: from floor plan, to style matched clips, to a buyer ready reel.
scenes.subtitle: FROM FLOOR PLAN TO BUYER REEL.
